Class InfFlowContractPO

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractPO
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractOperationPO
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.po.AbstractInfFlowPO
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.po.InfFlowContractPO
All Implemented Interfaces:
InfFlowLeafPO, InfFlowPO, ContractPO, IPersistablePO, ProofOblInput
public class InfFlowContractPO extends AbstractInfFlowPO implements ContractPO, InfFlowLeafPO

    • getIFVars

      public IFProofObligationVars getIFVars()

    • createLoaderConfig

      public Configuration createLoaderConfig()
      This method is called by a ProofSaver to store the proof specific settings in the given Properties. The stored settings have to contain all information required to instantiate the proof obligation again and this instance should create the same Sequent (if code and specifications are unchanged).
      Specified by:
      createLoaderConfig in interface IPersistablePO
      Overrides:
      createLoaderConfig in class AbstractOperationPO
      Returns:

      Description copied from interface: InfFlowPO

    • buildOperationBlocks

      @Deprecated protected ImmutableList<StatementBlock> buildOperationBlocks(ImmutableList<LocationVariable> formalParVars, ProgramVariable selfVar, ProgramVariable resultVar, Services services)
      Deprecated.
      Description copied from class: AbstractOperationPO
      Builds the code to execute in different statement blocks. 1. code to execute before the try block 2. code to execute in the try block 3. code to execute in the catch block 4. code to execute in the finally block
      Specified by:
      buildOperationBlocks in class AbstractOperationPO
      Parameters:
      formalParVars - Arguments from formal parameters for method call.
      selfVar - The self variable.
      resultVar - The result variable.
      services - services instance
      Returns:
      operation blocks as statement blocks

      @Deprecated protected JTerm getPre(List<LocationVariable> modHeaps, LocationVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, Map<LocationVariable, LocationVariable> atPreVars, Services services)
      Deprecated.
      Description copied from class: AbstractOperationPO
      Creates the precondition.
      Specified by:
      getPre in class AbstractOperationPO
      Parameters:
      modHeaps - The heaps.
      selfVar - The self variable.
      paramVars - The parameters ProgramVariables.
      atPreVars - Mapping of LocationVariable to the LocationVariable which contains the initial value.
      services - The Services to use.
      Returns:
      The JTerm representing the precondition.

      @Deprecated protected JTerm buildFrameClause(List<LocationVariable> modHeaps, Map<JTerm,JTerm> heapToAtPre, LocationVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, Services services)
      Deprecated.
      Description copied from class: AbstractOperationPO
      Builds the frame clause including the modifiable clause.
      Specified by:
      buildFrameClause in class AbstractOperationPO
      Parameters:
      modHeaps - a non-empty list of heaps variables
      heapToAtPre - The previous heap before execution.
      selfVar - The self variable.
      paramVars - The parameters ProgramVariables.
      services - services instance
      Returns:
      The created JTerm representing the frame clause.
